character.name: A top-down, slightly isometric pixel art sprite of a "Chaser" enemy for a 2D survivor game. The character is a "Shadow Imp"—a small, mischievous creature made of dark purple smoke with glowing red eyes. It has long, spindly arms reaching forward and a hunched, aggressive posture. 32x32 pixel scale. It should appear to be floating slightly, leaving a faint trail of dark particles. High contrast, clean outlines, matching the art style of a blue-robed pixel art Mage.
